items.translated_title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
items.content: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to Uber Eats in a tightly contested market.

items.translated_title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
items.content: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

items.translated_title: FBI says Iranian hackers are using Telegram to steal data in malware attacks
items.content: Hackers working for Iran’s government are using Telegram in hacking operations that use malware to target dissidents, opposition groups, and journalists who oppose its regime, according to the FBI.

items.translated_title: Sam Altman-backed fusion startup Helion in talks to sell power to OpenAI
items.content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is stepping down as board chair of Helion. His departure comes as reports that the two companies are negotiating a deal that would see Helion sell 12.5% of its power output to OpenAI.
